title: Hydrangea SEEMANII Evergreen Climbing Hydrangea in a 3 Litre Pot with Colour Care Label | Garden Ready Climbing Plant by Plant Lovers Garden
features: Evergreen, Hardy and Climbing which is especially good for a shady wall
Eventual height 12m and a spread of 4m
Flowers in the summer and pruning for size and shape should be done after flowering
A rare and unusal variaty of climbing Hydrangea as most tend to be deciduous
Easy to grow and no pruning required
description: This hardy evergreen, climbing Hydrangea has mid-green, leathery foliage. In summer, large domed, green-white flower heads appear which really make an impact and produce a lovely focal point to a garden.
